AC Language

  • Features
  • Backends
  • Install
  • GitHub

AC Language

A multi-backend compiler for the AC programming language. Write once, compile to 11+ targets including Python, JavaScript, C, C++, Rust, Go, Java, HTML, V, Assembly, and native binaries.

Install via npm

Features

Multi-Target Compilation

Compile to 11+ different backends including Python, JavaScript, C, C++, Rust, Go, Java, HTML, V, Assembly, and native binaries.

Clean Syntax

Beginner-friendly syntax with clean, readable code. Easy to learn and use.

Native Binaries

Compile directly to native x86-64 executables with no dependencies.

Event System

GUI event listeners and key bindings for interactive applications.

Widget System

Built-in UI components for creating graphical applications.

Caching System

Fast recompilation with .acc and .lir cache files.

Supported Backends

Python
JavaScript
C
C++
Rust
Go
Java
HTML
V
Assembly
Native Binary

Quick Start

# Install via npm
npm install -g aclang

# Compile and run
ac mycode.ac

# Compile to specific target
ac mycode.ac PY      # Python
ac mycode.ac BNY     # Native binary
ac mycode.ac ASM     # x86-64 assembly

# Use the REPL
ac-repl

AC Language - Write Once, Compile Anywhere
